---
title: "Thinking with Agents"
subtitle: "AI tools for teaching and research"
page-layout: full
body-classes: landing-page
title-block-style: none
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="landing-hero-split">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <h1>Thinking with<br>Agents</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">AI tools for teaching and research</p>
    <p class="hero-meta">Erkmen G. Aslim &amp; Emily Beam</p>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <h2 class="schedule-heading">Upcoming Webinars · June 2026</h2>
    <div class="schedule-item">
      <div class="schedule-date">Jun 15</div>
      <div class="schedule-title">TwA Webinar: Agentic Tools for Research</div>
      <div class="schedule-detail">10:00 AM–12:00 PM ET · Online (Teams)</div>
      <div class="schedule-actions">
        <a href="webinar-jun2026/twa-research-deck1-foundations-voice.pdf" class="slides-btn">Deck 1: Foundations &amp; Voice (PDF) →</a>
        <a href="webinar-jun2026/twa-research-deck2-website-brainstorming.pdf" class="slides-btn">Deck 2: Website &amp; Brainstorming (PDF) →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="schedule-item">
      <div class="schedule-date">Jun 17</div>
      <div class="schedule-title">TwA Webinar: Agentic Tools for Teaching</div>
      <div class="schedule-detail">10:00 AM–12:00 PM ET · Online (Teams)</div>
      <a href="https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/bc7022b1-63ae-470e-8c41-9c7890bdf108@1c177758-4d6b-43dc-aaeb-3b9c42562967" class="slides-btn">Register →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

::: {.landing-content}

```{=html}
<p class="reassurance">Pick a starting point below.</p>

<div class="pathway-cards">
  <div class="pathway-card">
    <h3>Learn the foundations</h3>
    <p>Terminal, Git, setup — a clear path from zero. Most economists can be doing useful work in an afternoon.</p>
    <a href="getting-started.html">Getting Started →</a>
  </div>
  <div class="pathway-card">
    <h3>See what's possible</h3>
    <p>Installable skills for research and teaching, plus workflow recipes you can try in 30 minutes.</p>
    <a href="skills-workflows.html">Skills &amp; Workflows →</a>
  </div>
  <div class="pathway-card">
    <h3>Teach this material</h3>
    <p>Drop-in modules with lesson plans and exercises for your own courses and workshops.</p>
    <a href="https://eabeam.github.io/teaching-ai">Teaching Modules →</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="start-router">
  <h2>Where should I start?</h2>
  <div class="router-entry">
    <div class="router-q">"I've never used a terminal."</div>
    <div class="router-a">→ <a href="getting-started.html">Getting Started</a>, Layer 1</div>
  </div>
  <div class="router-entry">
    <div class="router-q">"I use ChatGPT but want real tools."</div>
    <div class="router-a">→ <a href="getting-started.html">Getting Started</a>, Layer 3</div>
  </div>
  <div class="router-entry">
    <div class="router-q">"I already use Claude Code — show me the good stuff."</div>
    <div class="router-a">→ <a href="skills-workflows.html">Skills &amp; Workflows</a></div>
  </div>
  <div class="router-entry">
    <div class="router-q">"I want to teach this to my students."</div>
    <div class="router-a">→ <a href="https://eabeam.github.io/teaching-ai">Teaching Modules</a> (eabeam.github.io/teaching-ai)</div>
  </div>
  <div class="router-entry">
    <div class="router-q">"I have one week and no budget."</div>
    <div class="router-a">→ <a href="getting-started.html">Getting Started</a> (see the $0 path)</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

[About the presenters]{.landing-section-title}

**[Emily Beam](https://eabeam.github.io)** is an associate professor of economics at the University of Vermont, specializing in development economics and randomized impact evaluations. She uses AI tools daily across research, teaching, and project coordination.

**[Erkmen G. Aslim](https://sites.google.com/view/erkmenaslim/)** is an assistant professor of economics at the University of Vermont. His research spans health economics and applied microeconomics, and he integrates AI tools into both research and teaching workflows.

Together, they developed and delivered the [UVM Economics AI Bootcamp](events.qmd) (Spring 2026) and created the Thinking with Agents resource collection.

:::
